author: Brandjuh
description: Mission database system that fetches MissionChief possible missions and posts or updates them in Discord without duplicate spam.
install_msg: Thank you for installing MissionsDatabase! Use `[p]missions setup` and then `[p]missions sync 5` to run a safe test sync.
name: MissionsDatabase
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild configuration (forum channel IDs) and mission post tracking data.
